TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay, title = {Atayal Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: David Arkin kawas tay 1941, ryax sa tay 24 nqu tay 12, David Arkin, squliq na Bunge'. (wal mhuqil sa kawas tay 1991) qnxan na sraral David Arkin htgan beh Los Angeles,California. Arkin kekong te cyugal la. 1991 kawas 1 byacing 14 ryax,maki Los Angeles,California mhuqil la.( 49 kawas) cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of actors
S.PHON: *a*i* arkin kawas~…ē taj ****, rjax s~…ēa taj ** nqu taj **, *a*i* arkin, s~…ēquliq na ő≤uŇče Ē. (wal mńßuqil s~…ēa kawas~…ē taj ****) qnxan na s~…ēraral *a*i* arkin ńßt…£an ő≤eńß los~…ē aŇčeles~…ē, ¶~ ®ali*ornia. arkin kekoŇč te ¶~ ®ju…£al la. **** kawas~…ē * ő≤ja ¶~ ®iŇč ** rjax,maki los~…ē aŇčeles~…ē, ¶~ ®ali*ornia mńßuqil la.( ** kawas~…ē) ¶~ ®inkńßulan s~…ēa knita Ē s~…ēa ő≤rő≤iru Ē lis~…ēts~…ē o* a ¶~ ®tors~…ē
S.FORM: David Arkin kawas tay 1941, ryax sa tay 24 nqu tay 12, David Arkin, squliq na Bunge'. (wal mhuqil sa kawas tay 1991) qnxan na sraral David Arkin htgan beh Los Angeles,California. Arkin kekong te cyugal la. 1991 kawas 1 byacing 14 ryax,maki Los Angeles,California mhuqil la.( 49 kawas) cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of actors
